title: I am trying to add "Dependency" as a viewing option when I customize the (new) Kanban view
excerpt:
Hello! 
I checked through existing threads to solve my question but did not see a solution. But, in fairness, I would not have expected it. I only just now received a notification/greeting to the new Kanban view earlier …

posts.author: talongi (Thomas P. Alongi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I checked through existing threads to solve my question but did not see a solution. But, in fairness, I would not have expected it. I only just now received a notification/greeting to the new Kanban view earlier today (June 16, 2024), and all of these other threads are some 1-3 years old.

Simply put, I was able to include “Dependencies” on the recently-departed “old” Kanban view. But I don’t see the option here, and I’ve tried looking everywhere. Is this simply not an alternative yet, or am I missing the obvious?

Tom
